fa-face-disguise.appearanceId: a round face outline wearing a novelty disguise accessory with a large attached nose, bushy eyebrows, and glasses frames; circular face shape topped with a joke-shop disguise piece combining fake brows, nose bridge, and spectacles
fa-face-disguise.functionalityId: inserts a disguised or incognito reaction emoji into a message; marks content with a playful hiding or undercover sentiment
fa-face-disguise.intentId: express a playful or humorous disguised identity in a reaction; react with a fun undercover or anonymous personality

fa-face-dotted.appearanceId: a round face outline with small dots or spots scattered across the face surface in place of normal features, giving a textured or speckled appearance; circular face shape covered in tiny filled circles suggesting a dotted or polka-dot pattern
fa-face-dotted.functionalityId: inserts a dotted or textured face reaction emoji into a message; marks content with a quirky or abstract facial expression sentiment
fa-face-dotted.intentId: express a quirky, abstract, or unusual emotional state; react with a visually distinctive spotted-face emotion

fa-face-downcast-sweat.appearanceId: a round face outline with downward-angled sad eyebrows, closed or downward-cast eyes, and a small sweat droplet on the side of the face; circular face with a dejected or tired expression plus a teardrop-like sweat bead near the temple
fa-face-downcast-sweat.functionalityId: inserts a downcast or exhausted sweating reaction emoji into a message; marks content with a weary, deflated, or relieved-but-sad sentiment
fa-face-downcast-sweat.intentId: express weariness, defeat, or exhausted sadness in a reaction; communicate a feeling of being drained or downhearted with effort

fa-face-drooling.appearanceId: a round face outline with half-open or droopy eyes and a small drool or saliva droplet hanging from the corner of the open mouth; circular face shape with a slack-jawed expression and a dangling drool mark below the lip
fa-face-drooling.functionalityId: inserts a drooling or craving reaction emoji into a message; marks content with a hungry, infatuated, or intensely desiring sentiment
fa-face-drooling.intentId: express intense craving, hunger, or infatuation in a reaction; react to something extremely appealing with a drooling desire emotion

fa-face-exhaling.appearanceId: a round face outline with eyes in a neutral or slightly closed position and a mouth blowing out a visible puff of air or breath lines curling outward; circular face shape showing pursed lips with small curved exhale strokes emanating from the mouth
fa-face-exhaling.functionalityId: inserts an exhaling or relieved sighing reaction emoji into a message; marks content with a releasing tension or tired-exhale sentiment
fa-face-exhaling.intentId: express relief, exhaustion, or releasing pent-up stress in a reaction; communicate a deep sigh or breath-out emotional response

fa-face-explode.appearanceId: a round face outline with an explosive burst or starburst shape replacing or erupting from the top of the head, and wide shocked eyes below; circular face shape with an irregular jagged eruption emerging from the skull area suggesting a mind blown or exploding head
fa-face-explode.functionalityId: inserts an exploding head or mind-blown reaction emoji into a message; marks content with an overwhelmed or shocking revelation sentiment
fa-face-explode.intentId: express that something is mind-blowing or overwhelmingly shocking; react to incredible or unbelievable content with a head-exploding emotion

fa-face-expressionless.appearanceId: a round face outline with flat horizontal line eyes or small neutral dots and a perfectly straight flat horizontal line for a mouth; circular face shape conveying zero emotion with completely neutral level brows and a flat closed mouth
fa-face-expressionless.functionalityId: inserts an expressionless or blank-faced reaction emoji into a message; marks content with a deadpan, unamused, or completely neutral sentiment
fa-face-expressionless.intentId: express total indifference or a completely neutral unimpressed reaction; react to something with a blank deadpan emotional response

fa-face-eyes-xmarks.appearanceId: a round face outline with two X marks in place of the eyes and a small open or wavy mouth; circular face shape showing crossed-out eyes suggesting unconsciousness or defeat
fa-face-eyes-xmarks.functionalityId: inserts a dizzy, knocked-out, or dead reaction emoji into a message; marks content with an overwhelmed, incapacitated, or defeated sentiment
fa-face-eyes-xmarks.intentId: express feeling knocked out, overwhelmed, or utterly defeated; react with an incapacitated or dizzied emotional state

fa-face-fearful.appearanceId: a round face outline with wide open round eyes, raised and arched eyebrows pulled inward with fear, and an open mouth stretched into a frightened grimace; circular face shape showing large fearful eyes and a gaping scared mouth expression
fa-face-fearful.functionalityId: inserts a fearful or terrified reaction emoji into a message; marks content with a scared or frightened sentiment
fa-face-fearful.intentId: express fear, terror, or being deeply frightened in a reaction; react to something scary or alarming with a frightened emotion

fa-face-frown-slight.appearanceId: a round face outline with neutral or slightly angled brows and a gentle downward curve of the mouth that is less pronounced than a full frown; circular face shape with a subtle mild frown suggesting mild displeasure or disappointment
fa-face-frown-slight.functionalityId: inserts a slightly frowning or mildly unhappy reaction emoji into a message; marks content with a minor disappointment or subdued displeasure sentiment
fa-face-frown-slight.intentId: express mild dissatisfaction or slight disappointment in a reaction; react to something mildly negative with a gentle unhappy expression

fa-face-glasses.appearanceId: a round face outline with a pair of eyeglasses frames sitting on the face, showing two circular or rectangular lens outlines connected by a nose bridge; circular face shape wearing spectacles with visible frame shapes over the eye area
fa-face-glasses.functionalityId: inserts a bespectacled or intellectual-looking reaction emoji into a message; marks content with a nerdy, studious, or scholarly sentiment

fa-face-hand-over-mouth.appearanceId: a round face outline with wide or slightly squinted eyes and a hand shape covering the lower half of the face over the mouth area; circular face shape with a palm silhouette pressed across the mouth suggesting surprise or suppressed speech
fa-face-hand-over-mouth.functionalityId: inserts a shocked hand-over-mouth or gasping reaction emoji into a message; marks content with a surprised, embarrassed, or speechless sentiment

fa-face-hand-peeking.appearanceId: a round face outline with eyes peeking over a hand shape covering the lower portion of the face from below, as if hiding behind hands and looking over the top; circular face with eyes visible above fingers splayed across the lower face

fa-face-hand-yawn.intentId: express boredom, drowsiness, or being unengaged in a reaction; react to uninteresting content with a yawning tired emotion

fa-face-head-bandage.appearanceId: a round face outline with a bandage or medical wrapping visible across the forehead or top of the head, and a simple or pained expression; circular face shape with a horizontal strip bandage across the upper face or skull area

fa-face-holding-back-tears.appearanceId: a round face outline with trembling or quivering lower lip, wide glistening eyes with visible tear buildup, and raised inner eyebrows forming a sad arch; circular face shape showing the brink-of-crying expression with wet shimmering eyes and wobbling mouth

fa-face-hushed.appearanceId: a round face outline with wide open eyes and a small tight or pursed oval mouth expressing a hushed or shushed look; circular face shape showing a surprised or startled expression with a small constrained open mouth

fa-face-icicles.appearanceId: a round face outline with small icicle or frost spike shapes hanging from the lower portion of the face or chin area, and a cold or shivering expression; circular face shape with pointed icicle drips at the bottom suggesting extreme cold

fa-face-kiss-closed-eyes.appearanceId: a round face outline with both eyes closed in a content squint and a small puckered or heart-shaped kiss mouth; circular face shape showing blissfully closed eyes and pursed lips forming a kissing expression
fa-face-kiss-closed-eyes.functionalityId: inserts a kissing or affectionate closed-eyes reaction emoji into a message; marks content with a loving, romantic, or tender sentiment

fa-face-lying.appearanceId: a round face outline with a long elongated nose extending outward from the face similar to a Pinocchio nose, and a neutral or guilty-looking expression; circular face shape with an exaggerated long nose protrusion suggesting dishonesty

fa-face-nauseated.appearanceId: a round face outline with a green-tinted or pale complexion implication, a wavy or squiggly mouth suggesting nausea, and half-closed uncomfortable eyes; circular face shape with a sickly grimacing mouth curve and uneasy or drooping eyes

fa-face-nose-steam.appearanceId: a round face outline with small steam puff lines or wisps emanating from the nostrils, and a frustrated or angry furrowed expression; circular face shape showing an irritated scowl with visible steam clouds coming from the nose

fa-face-party.appearanceId: a round face outline with a party hat or cone-shaped hat on top of the head, a festive expression, and possibly a party horn or noisemaker near the mouth; circular face shape wearing a pointed celebration hat with a cheerful or excited expression

fa-face-pensive.appearanceId: a round face outline with downward-tilted or slightly angled eyes looking to one side, slightly furrowed or flat brows, and a closed neutral to faintly downturned mouth suggesting deep thought; circular face shape conveying a contemplative or quietly sad reflective expression

fa-face-persevering.appearanceId: a round face outline with tightly clenched or squinted shut eyes, raised inner brows forming a pained arch, and a grimacing or teeth-clenched mouth suggesting endurance; circular face shape showing a strained effortful expression of pushing through difficulty

fa-face-pleading.appearanceId: a round face outline with large wide puppy-dog eyes with a glossy or glistening sheen, upward-arched inner eyebrows forming a begging look, and a small downturned or trembling mouth; circular face shape with oversized pleading eyes and a hopeful begging expression

fa-face-raised-eyebrow.appearanceId: a round face outline with one eyebrow visibly arched upward higher than the other, and a neutral or skeptical mouth expression; circular face shape showing a single raised brow conveying skepticism or questioning curiosity

fa-face-sad-sweat.appearanceId: a round face outline with downward-sad eyebrows, a frowning curved mouth, and a small sweat droplet on the side of the face; circular face shape combining a clear sad expression with a teardrop-like sweat bead near the temple

fa-face-scream.appearanceId: a round face outline with wide open round eyes, both hands raised to the sides of the face, and a wide gaping oval-shaped screaming mouth; circular face shape referencing The Scream pose with horror-wide eyes and a large open terrified mouth
